% Auto-generated source-truth intake stub for ID11410.
\tzpentry{ID11410}{General Sn Fractional Breathing Rate}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
For an n-sphere whose radius breathes with H=Rdot/R, the fractional hypervolume rate is nH.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\frac{\dot V_{S^{n}}}{V_{S^{n}}}=n\frac{\dot R}{R}=nH
\paragraph{Registry Metadata.}
UUID: \texttt{4dd2d15c-acbe-5be4-9899-5bdea36fc70c}. PiID: \texttt{PiID-11410-s4s5-mix}. LOC: \texttt{QC - Physics}. arXiv: \texttt{physics.gen-ph}.
